title: FormatDomainStrict — names/tld decomposition, maxParts, hyphen-edge
description: FormatDomainStrict (format `domain`); stricter than FormatDomain — ≤6 labels, ≥2 parts, strict name/TLD patterns
notes: Rejected: a leading-hyphen label (`-bad.com`), more than 6 labels (`aa.bb.cc.dd.ee.ff.com`), a numeric TLD (`example.123`), an underscore in a label (`ex_ample.com`), and a single-part name (`localhost`). The format error is `{name: domain}` (no `val`).
